taskPreset.title: Create last30days Task
taskPreset.description: Queue a structured last30days research preset with mode-aware query shaping and explicit repository scope.

panel.projectHint: The last30days task will be created in the selected project.
panel.taskNameHint: Optional. Leave empty to let the title be optimized asynchronously after dispatch.
panel.taskNamePlaceholder: Research recent sentiment around OpenAI vs Anthropic
panel.repositoryAccessHint: Choose repositories from the selected project and assign read or write access per repository.
panel.repositoryAccessEmpty: No repositories are available for the selected project yet.
panel.commandHint: Pick the mode that best matches how the last30days skill should shape the query.
panel.queryHint: Enter the topic plus any extra framing you want the research to honor, such as an `A vs B` comparison or the decision this should inform.
panel.queryPlaceholder:
OpenAI vs Anthropic
Compare pricing, developer sentiment, and launch momentum, then connect the findings back to our preset-task design.

general.description: Research the topic as entered and summarize the main signals from the last 30 days.

comparison.description: Compare the entities in the query directly when the topic is in `A vs B` form.

competitors.description: Start from a seed topic and surface nearby competitors, alternatives, and substitute products.

prompting.description: Focus on what users want, request, or complain about in the selected topic area.
